scenes.narration: Merit week's when it all hits at once. Who's below range, which managers earn less than their team, what it's going to cost to fix. Upload your roster to ShiftWorks HR and you'll have a review queue and a leadership PDF in under thirty seconds.
You probably already have the file — Workday, ADP, or just a spreadsheet. Drag it in. No new HRIS, no API, nothing to configure.
First thing you see is your review queue, ranked by severity. Critical items up top, so you know what to tackle before merit letters go out.
You get the dollars too. What it costs to bring people up to minimum, your merit pool, total exposure. So when finance asks, you're ready.
Every flag comes with a name, a department, and the exact dollar gap. Not just a row count buried in Excel.
It catches the awkward stuff too. Like when a manager earns less than someone on their team. You see both names, side by side.
When leadership asks about pay fairness, you've got median pay by gender and race, and the dollar gap between groups. Pulled straight from your roster.
If your file has location, you'll see median pay by city and how your team's spread across geographies. No extra spreadsheet.
Need something for the exec briefing? One click. Risk level, total exposure, and the talking points they'll actually ask about.
Try ShiftWorks HR free with your own roster. No credit card required.
